reviews.review_description: I don't how but the playing field is near the floor meaning I have to sit on the ground to play. I couldn't adjust the field height. Also the water physics is kind confusing. I'm not really sure how feel about the game. There is potential but it needs lots of refinement. I want remote precise control of the dirt. I don't want to be that close since the game doesn't support hand controls. I want clearer water/dirt mechanics. For example I should be able to control how fast and wide my dirt placing is. I want the water to show clear signs to where it's coming from and heading to. I just want the game to feel as intuitive as playing with sand.

This is a nice way to wind down and relax for the evening. One thing to take this type of game to the next level is to add more, high quality music. If there was a variety of sound scapes (ocean waves for example) and other tranquil, meditative type music to choose from, this would be awesome!

It's not a big deal, but for anyone looking to play competitively, it was difficult for me to see exactly which portion of the land I was raising (or lowering). I feel a beam coming from the controllers would take away from the zen/immersion, but maybe a lightly highlighted area that will be moved would work well.

Great work on the game!

I played until level 24 non stop! I was totally addicted and had no idea it had been over an hour! It was the perfect way to end my day! Plus it’s FREE! 

Great game and lovely environments! 

🙌🏻DOWNLOAD IT NOW! 🙌🏻

After their energetic last game Project Aeroes, Super Hyper Mega are back to get your brain spinning like a whirlpool with their new puzzle game Wet!
Check out my first impressions gameplay vid over on my channel 😁✌️☮️❤️
Relaxing experience. Very fun and original puzzle game. Highly recommended!

I like the art style and it's some cool tech to lift and lower terrain and watch the water simulate - runs pretty smooth and considering it's free AND you get to keep it forever it's worth grabbing to try it out. I'd suggest having some sort of indication on the terrain of where your controllers are actually going to affect it (like when your manipulating terrain in unreal or unity it draws a circle). I'd also rather be able to grab and move the map around like in other mixed reality apps rather than configuring the position in the title screen. It's fun and relaxing there's potential here if they keep working on it.

Had no idea I needed this in my life but Wet is genuinely a great way to relax in VR.

…until you reach the later levels, at that point it becomes really engaging and challenging,a bit less peaceful, but still great fun!

Wet is a satisfying, meditative game to play while seated. Perfect for playing while winding down and decompressing. Personally, I like to turn the audio down and listen to some of my own music while playing.

I got this app for free and while I appreciate it for the aforementioned reasons, I'm not sure that I'd pay more than a few dollars for this if it's going to be released in its current state. Just my $.02.

reviews.review_title: Lovely relaxing puzzle game in MR
reviews.review_description: A minimal puzzle game with an alluring aesthetic.
